question.label: Less present rituals
question.name: You said 'less present in rituals' — what changed there for you?
question.description: Drills into his own phrasing to surface the specific shift behind reduced participation.

answer: After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.

assessment.note: He links reduced participation to the promotion decision and says he lacked clarity on what needed to change, signaling strong disengagement and mild role-direction confusion.

new_queue.label: Needed change clarity
new_queue.name: When you say 'what needed to change' — what felt unclear to you?

new_queue.label: Feedback heard
new_queue.name: What feedback did you actually take in from that process?

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Feedback meaning
new_queue.name: What does that feedback mean to you now?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help you make the next few weeks feel more deliberate?

new_queue.label: Concrete next move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what's the first concrete thing you want to move by our next conversation?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
